summary: Complete backend and frontend testing of Punjabi Alphabet Learning App. All 14 backend tests pass. All critical frontend flows verified: home page, letter selection, study flashcards, results screen, mastery color coding, both study modes.

issues: Card shows romanization on front correctly, but 'CORRECT' and 'WRONG' text appears in inner_text because the answer buttons are in the DOM - this is normal behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and well structured (~187 lines)
TTS route doesn't validate EMERGENT_LLM_KEY presence at startup - returns 503 at runtime which is acceptable
Progress update allows any letter_id (no validation against PUNJABI_ALPHABET) - minor issue, low impact
In-memory tts_cache will be lost on server restart - acceptable for MVP
seed_data_creation: Created test progress entries for 'sa', 'ha' letters during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows working: home page with 60 letters, gurmukhi_to_sound and sound_to_gurmukhi modes, letter selection with category filters, select all/deselect all, study flashcard with reveal/correct/wrong, card counter, progress bar, results screen, study again, mastery color coding (amber dots visible on letter grid after answering). Backend APIs all healthy. TTS endpoint tested and works (200 returned). Mastery dots shown as amber (learning) on letter tiles after few correct answers.
